title: AAIB Update: Preliminary report into Air India flight AI171
body: "Air Accidents Investigation Branch (UK) has been made aware that a preliminary report into the tragic accident which occurred on 12 June 2025 has been published by the Indian Air Accident Investigation Bureau. The preliminary report can be viewed on their website: Air Accident Investigation Bureau India preliminary report  The UK AAIB welcomes the publication of this preliminary report, which is a summary of factual information uncovered so far by the AAIB India investigation. The UK AAIB are in process of reviewing this preliminary report in detail and remains in communication with AAIB India.  The UK AAIB has ‘Expert’ status in the Indian safety investigation. In accordance with international protocols, release of information on the investigation rests solely with the Indian authorities. "
